form.formComment: Two-year-old filly who is first starter by Chronnos out of Cau. Looks sure to be above average.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, 4th of 11 at this track on February 9 over 1000m, 14 len behind Iluminada with 56kg at $5.30. Second-up 2nd of 7 at this track on March 15 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Urbs carrying 56kg at $4.60. Key chance expected to feature.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 2nd of 10 at this track on March 22 over 1000m, 0.3 len behind Up To You carrying 55kg at $9.20. The run before that 4th of 12 at this track on March 1 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 9 len behind Ombre Hair with 56kg at $11.80. In the mix again.

form.formComment: Jumped as a despised roughie at debut, second last of 8 at this track on March 22 over 1000m, 18 len behind Premeditado with 56kg at $82.80. Requires plenty of improvement after a modest debut.

form.formComment: Second-up. Promising on debut won by 1.5 len at Taruma January 11 over 700m on a heavy track defeating Maringa with 56kg at $2.70. Went for a spell before returning 2nd in a small field at this track in LR on March 22 over 1300m, 7 len behind Paid In Full carrying 56kg at $4. Among the top chances.
